items.label: About ZYNQ.peer
items.content:
# ZYNQ.peer

`ZYNQ.peer` is a lightweight WebRTC wrapper built on top of PeerJS.
It enables real-time peer-to-peer communication with messaging, audio, and video.

---

## Core Features

- Peer-to-peer messaging
- Video & audio calls
- Session management
- Event-driven API
- Auto heartbeat system
- Zero setup usage

items.label: Quick Start
items.content:
# Quick Start

### 1. Import + Load
```javascript
import 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@0.2.5/index.min.js'
await ZYNQ.load("peer")
await ZYNQ.peer.start(your-id) // or nothing for a random ID
```

---

### 2. Get your ID
```javascript
ZYNQ.peer.on('ready', id => {
  console.log(id)
})
```

---

### 3. Connect
```javascript
await ZYNQ.peer.connect('peer-id')
```

---

### 4. Send message
```javascript
ZYNQ.peer.sendTo('peer-id', 'hello')
```

---

### 5. Receive messages
```javascript
ZYNQ.peer.on('message', ({ peerId, message }) => {
  console.log(message)
})
```

items.label: Events
items.content:
# Events

```javascript
ZYNQ.peer.on('ready', id => {})
ZYNQ.peer.on('message', data => {})
ZYNQ.peer.on('invite', data => data.accept())
```

---

## Available Events

- ready
- invite
- joined
- left
- message
- remote-stream
- local-stream
- bitrate
- error
- destroyed

items.label: Messaging
items.content:
# Messaging

## Send to peer
```javascript
ZYNQ.peer.sendTo('id', 'hello')
```

## Broadcast
```javascript
ZYNQ.peer.broadcast('hello all')
```

## Receive
```javascript
ZYNQ.peer.on('message', ({ peerId, message }) => {
  console.log(peerId, message)
})
```

items.label: Video/Audio
System Behavior
items.content:
# System

- Auto heartbeat every 2s
- Auto disconnect after timeout
- Session tracking
- Bitrate monitoring

---

## Start
```javascript
await ZYNQ.peer.start()
```

## Destroy
```javascript
ZYNQ.peer.destroy()
```
